creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
On Fri, 11 Aug 2006 17:28:38 GMT
Martin Wilke <miwi@FreeBSD.org> mentioned:

> Synopsis: [PATCH] math/fxt: update to 2006.07.04, take maintainership
>=20
> State-Changed-From-To: open->suspended
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Fri Aug 11 17:27:08 UTC 2006
> State-Changed-Why:=20
> COPYTREE_SHARE macro is submitted in ports/100996.
> I wait for decision of portmgr.
>=20
>=20
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D101589
>=20
>=20

This macro was redefined in fxt Makefile, so it doesn't depend on
ports/100996.

Thus it can be safely committed. Do it please. It will not interfere
with bsd.port.mk in any way.

--=20
Stanislav Sedov         MBSD labs, Inc.         <ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru>
